Info.ToolboxConfigModel: {"entries":[{"content":{"appGalleryLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_3567d9d4-64fa-4b56-8ca4-d43924db9770","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxAppGalleryFiles_3567d9d4-64fa-4b56-8ca4-d43924db9770"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"dde5a87b-81b7-4516-a519-34fd731f94e1"},"authorEmail":"zhanal@humusoft.cz","authorName":"Lubor Zháňal","authorOrganization":"HUMUSOFT s.r.o.","description":"PHX is a object-oriented physics engine for MATLAB. Scenes are built from objects such as bodies, shapes, joints, springs, force fields and can be drawn directly into MATLAB axes. Toolbox includes MATLAB API, Simulink block, documentation and examples. MATLAB R2025a or newer is required.","gettingStartedGuideLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_3567d9d4-64fa-4b56-8ca4-d43924db9770","labelID":"Deployment_GettingStartedGuideFile_3567d9d4-64fa-4b56-8ca4-d43924db9770"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"add5815b-97a2-4a5c-be66-414bda1631a7"},"matlabPathExclusionList":["phx/+phx/+internal/mex_sources"],"maxRelease":"R2026a","minRelease":"R2025a","outputFileName":"PHXToolbox.mltbx","outputFolder":"PHX Toolbox\\release","summary":"Object-oriented MATLAB API for 3D rigid-body physics.","supportedPlatforms":["Windows","Linux","Mac","MatlabOnline"],"toolboxFolder":"/","toolboxImgLabel":{"content":{"categoryID":"Deployment_Category_3567d9d4-64fa-4b56-8ca4-d43924db9770","labelID":"Deployment_ToolboxImageFile_3567d9d4-64fa-4b56-8ca4-d43924db9770"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectLabel","uuid":"d107a8c6-d808-41c1-b039-7bfd3a529cee"},"toolboxName":"PHX Toolbox","toolboxVersion":"1.0.0","uniqueId":"a4cad771-c4ec-4a3b-9adc-9a3d155d5172"},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ToolboxConfiguration","uuid":"0a2c0977-a12d-4ea2-a8f0-4ef063ab495b"},{"content":{},"type":"deployment.toolbox.model.ProjectStateValidationIssueList","uuid":"041e3814-0f8d-4e46-b7ee-7e28f4276a18"}],"packageUris":["http://schema.mathworks.com/mf0/deployment_toolbox_model/1.0.0"],"version":"1.0"}
